name: CORSAIR FRAME 4500X RS-R ARGB Panoramic Glass Mid-Tower PC Case – Panoramic Glass Exterior – InfiniRail™  Fan Mounting System – Fits Dual 360mm Radiators – ASUS BTF, MSI Project Zero, and Gigabyte Pro
